title: Create: Reactive Stress (CRS)
description: A simple mod that got inspired by satisfactory/factorio, fluctuating electricity usage. Brings the function into CreateMod.
body:
This project originally got made for CreateMod as an addon to make the gameplay a bit more challenging and interesting, while not adding in new blocks and items. The mod itself only changes how Stress is calculated in the CreateMod. If the Create machines are working aka. crafting/processing it will apply that extra multiplier thus making the machines use more stress.


**Also available on Curseforge:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-reactive-stress-crs


**Recommeded to use with but optional:**

Create: Picky Wheels (makes water wheels/windmills spam limited to biomes)

Create: Low Heated (removes the ability to use campfires for steam engines)

 https://createmod.com/schematics/min-max-limiter
 

**Currently avaliable in the mod:**

Support for both 1.20.1/1.21.1 Create v6

The multipliers can be changed in the mod's config.


**Supports:**

- Mechanical Press x2.5
- Mechanical Mixer x2
- Mechanical Saw (partial:horizontal mode) x2
- Mill Stone x2
- Crushing wheel x3


**Does not work with:**

(**Note:** most of them already passive machines eg.: Fan)

- Mechanical Crafters
- Mechanical Drill
- Mechanical Arm
- Deployer
- Mechanical Fan


**NOTE:** This is a proof of concept.
This mod never was tested with other CreateMod addons.
 Should work on server-side only but optional on client.


**Q:** Can i use it in my modpack? **A:** Yes, feel free to use it.

Dont forget to mention/link a reference for the credits.
